stories.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
stories.summary: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
stories.summary: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.

stories.title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
stories.summary: Some protesters demanding education reforms said they were injured in clashes with police who banned the march.

stories.title: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
stories.summary: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.

stories.title: Scores feared dead after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
stories.summary: Sixty-seven people have been rescued but the ferry is thought to have had more than 130 people on board.

stories.title: JD Vance says wife Usha and son 'happy and healthy' after birth of fourth child
stories.summary: The couple welcomed their fourth child, Alec Neel Vance, on Sunday morning.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
stories.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
stories.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

stories.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
stories.summary: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

stories.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
stories.summary: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

stories.title: Beyond grep: The case for a context-rich AI coding harness
stories.summary: Augment Code's Vinay Perneti talks models, harnesses, and context.

stories.title: India's first privately-developed rocket reaches orbit on dramatic debut launch
stories.summary: "On the first attempt, reaching orbit, I never thought it was possible."

stories.title: As mosquito ranges expand, better monitoring is key to preventing disease
stories.summary: Monitoring is expensive and labor intensive. But it helps public health officials stop outbreaks.

stories.title: Will AI fix prior authorization—or make it worse?

stories.title: Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
stories.summary: The FireSat program can spot wildfires that other satellites miss.

stories.title: The Pentagon's Space Development Agency hasn't moved as fast as anyone would like
stories.summary: "Missiles are being launched at the joint force every single day in [Operation] Epic Fury."

stories.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over

stories.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
stories.summary: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

stories.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
stories.summary: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

stories.title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
stories.summary: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.

stories.title: Some dinosaurs could rise like giants until they grew too big

stories.title: Ofcom launches investigation into Married at First Sight UK

stories.summary: The singer's third album is full of incisive, witty lyrics that are let down by muted production.

stories.title: Former World's Strongest Man to become a Gladiator
stories.summary: Tom Stoltman, a 32-year-old, 6ft 8in athlete from the Highlands, will join the cast of the BBC Saturday night primetime show for the fourth series.
